task_completion.description: Create a sketch for the L-shaped bracket profile with 50mm arms and 5mm thickness.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2D sketch in FreeCAD showing an L-shape with dimension constraints of 50mm for the outer arm lengths and 5mm for the thickness.

task_completion.description: Pad (extrude) the L-shaped sketch to a total width of 30mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D solid L-bracket visible in the FreeCAD viewport, with a 'Pad' feature in the Tree View and a length/width parameter of 30mm.

task_completion.description: Create a sketch for the triangular stiffening rib connecting the two arms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2D sketch showing a line or triangle connecting the inner faces of the L-bracket, approximately 30-35mm from the inner corner.

task_completion.description: Apply the Rib feature to create a 4mm thick triangular stiffening rib.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D triangular rib connecting the two arms of the bracket in the viewport. The Tree View should show a 'Rib' feature, and its thickness parameter should be set to 4mm.
A save dialog or the FreeCAD window title bar showing the file name 'ribbed_bracket.FCStd' saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD graphical user interface to construct the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with FreeCAD toolbars, Tree View, and Property View, rather than terminal commands or Python console scripts doing the work.

integrity.description: The model was built step-by-step rather than imported as a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD Tree View shows a genuine construction history (e.g., Body, Sketch, Pad, Sketch, Rib) instead of a single imported solid or mesh.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the FreeCAD modeling process.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing scripts to generate the .FCStd file directly or copying a pre-existing file to the target directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/ribbed_bracket.FCStd. The final model must include a 'PartDesign::Rib' feature, which should be visible as a 'Rib' object in the FreeCAD Tree View.
